arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners 'expected' to hold 'preliminary talks' for Andrea Berta favourite
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly expected to hold preliminary talks over a deal for Inter Milan's Lautaro Martinez, whom incoming sporting director Andrea Berta rates highly.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Arsenal - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Ruben Amorim's side face tough test against the Gunners
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Manchester United welcome Arsenal to Old Trafford in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Mikel Arteta receives Alexander Isak warning
arts.sum: All four clubs are long-term admirers of Isak, although Arsenal and Liverpool are currently considered to be the two most likely teams to complete a deal for the 25-year-old this summer. However, Newcastle have no intention of selling the Sweden star and only an offer of more than €180m would even tempt Eddie Howe’s side into negotiations over a summer transfer.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes concerning confession as Man Utd chiefs bin Sir Jim Ratcliffe project
arts.sum: Manchester United part-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe had put an audacious plan into effect, but Ruben Amorim's latest comments appear to suggest he doesn't believe the target is achievable

arts.ttl: CHRIS SUTTON: Why Chido Obi reminds me of Wayne Rooney - and how Ethan Nwaneri is already Arsenal's most reliable attacker
arts.sum: CHRIS SUTTON: There is no doubt that Obi seems a little bit raw, which is normal at 17 with only 73 minutes of first team action to his name so far, but he looks extremely physical.

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Arsenal team news LIVE! & highlights
arts.sum: TV: Sky Customers can watch on Sky Sports Main Event and Premier League from 4pm Sunday. App: Sky Customers can also watch on the Sky Sports app

arts.ttl: Roy Keane fears Man United haven't reached rock bottom yet as he says the club's standard have been dropping for years
arts.sum: Roy Keane thinks Manchester United could still reach new lows after what has been a miserable season.

arts.ttl: The six players SAFE from Man Utd summer PURGE
arts.sum: Manchester United are set for a summer purge of their under-performing squad and Mickael Silvestre believes that only six players are safe from the chop. These players are Bruno Fernandes, Amad Diallo, Kobbie Mainoo, Alejandro Garnacho, Noussair Mazraoi and Patrick Dorgu.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville blasts Man United's recruitment and admits he's 'struggling' with the Red Devils' demise: 'I look around the dressing room and wonder how the club has ended up in this position'
arts.sum: Gary Neville issued a damning verdict on Manchester United's current state of affairs, as he outlined how their substandard ownership have led to their demise on the pitch.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Liverpool and Chelsea sent scouts to watch “phenomenal” 19-G/A star last month
arts.sum: Arsenal, Liverpool and Chelsea are reportedly keeping tabs on the Inter Milan striker Marcus Thuram and they could look to make a move for him in the summer. According to TBR football, all three clubs sent scouts to watch the player in action last month in the Champions League.
